asset_rebuild_note: P4-03 step 1 — seed manifest, NO asset published yet. release_tag/asset_url/sha256 are null on purpose: the operator has not yet run shared-utils/sop-embed-once/build-and-publish.sh with a real Gemini key against the canonical sops.jsonl (that is an operator action at deploy time, mirroring how the persona prebuilt-index was first published — see shared-utils/prebuilt-index/INDEX-MANIFEST.json history). shared-utils/provision-sop-embeddings.sh reads asset_rebuild_required==true as 'nothing to provision yet' and no-ops additively (never blocks install/update, never downloads a null asset_url). Once build-and-publish.sh publishes the first real asset, this file is committed with concrete release_tag/asset_url/sha256/sop_count and asset_rebuild_required flips to false.
